opportunities.title: DPS Employee II
opportunities.description:
The Village of Paw Paw Department of Public Services is seeking a motivated individual to join our team. This employee would perform a variety of routine tasks related to the maintenance and repair of streets, parks, sewer lines, water lines, sewer lift stations and brush and leaf pickup.

Please mention the word **STRONGEST** and tag RNjQuMjM2LjEzNS4xMTM= when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RNjQuMjM2LjEzNS4xMTM=). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.
